content.en:
Six thousand five hundred and eleven.

A Death Void area, where there is silence, but in the empty void there is a stone the size of an ordinary star, this stone is concave and convex, but there is a small space hidden inside.

Ye Tian and the two leaders gathered the Star Realm God here.

"Great Chief, this is a branch of our Ice Ghost Organization, and it is also the entrance to a ruin. "

The Gathering Star God said.

"Good!"

Ye Tian wasn't worried that the Gathering Star Realm God would deceive and trap him, after all, he was just a copy body.

Moreover, he had already obtained the Domain-Breaking Star Array and the Boundary Disk, and he could shuttle between Territory 7362 and the Ice Ghost Organization's headquarters at any time.

So, if this replica body falls, nothing will happen.

Wow!!

Ye Tian and the Gathering Star Realm God entered the small space inside this stone and saw many peak Realm Gods.

"I've seen the second leader!"

Many peak realm gods said respectfully.

"This 20 is the big leader!"

The Gathering Star Realm God introduced Ye Tian to many peak Realm Gods.

These peak realm gods still didn't know what was happening at the headquarters, and they were all stunned at the moment, and they immediately became afraid.

Obviously, their original big leader, the Ice Bee Realm God, must have fallen, otherwise they wouldn't have changed to a big leader.

Moreover, they could also see that the cultivation of this great leader had reached a half-step extradimensional realm, and pinching them to death was like pinching an ant to death.

"Great Chief!"

They all said respectfully.

"Open the formation, let me in!"

Ye Tian ordered.

"Yes!"

Many pinnacle realm gods responded to the Dao.

Airplanes!!!

The entrance to this ruin was opened, in fact, this ruin has always been open, but after the ice ghost organization discovered this place, they used the formation to cover the entrance.

Seeing the entrance open, Ye Tian immediately escaped into the ruins.

Seeing that Ye Tian had entered, the other peak realm gods asked the second leader of the Gathering Star Realm God: "Second leader, big leader, no, has the Ice Bee Realm God fallen?"

The Star Gathering Realm God nodded helplessly: "The Ice Bee Realm God and the Ziya Realm God both broke through to the half-step transcendent realm not long ago, and they were killed by the new big leader!"

Hiss!!!!

These peak realm gods gasped, and the two half-step transcendent realms were actually killed, which showed how terrifying Ye Tian's strength was.

At this moment, they no longer have the intention to rebel, even if they are lucky enough to break through to the half-step transcendent realm, they still can't beat Ye Tian.

......

"The flesh has become incomparably weak!"

Ye Tian frowned slightly.

As soon as he entered the ruins, he noticed that something was wrong.

He was a half-step extradimensional realm, how powerful his physical body was, but now he felt very weak, as if he was born like this.

It's not right.

But no matter how he looked at it, it was as if this body was like this.

"Extradimensional Rules!"

Ye Tianming came to his senses.

This should be the effect of extradimensional rules, the owner of this ruin used the extradimensional rules to modify the rules of this ruin, any creature that enters here, the physical body will become weak, unless he can break the extradimensional rules with extradimensional rules, don't think about breaking the influence.

In addition, the will and extradimensional power have been affected.

It can be said that his current strength can only play to the extent of one-ten-thousandth of his usual time at most.

Of course, not only him, any half-step transcendent realm or peak realm god who enters here will be suppressed in strength.

At this time, Ye Tian was very much looking forward to this ruin.

If it was just the relics of an ordinary extradimensional realm, he might not be able to obtain many good things, after all, his current net worth was really no less than an ordinary extradimensional realm, and he naturally couldn't look down on the relics left by the ordinary extradimensional realm.

But if it is the extra-dimensional realm that comprehends the extra-dimensional rules, it will be different, every extra-dimensional realm who comprehends the extra-dimensional rules is far above the existence of the ordinary extra-dimensional realm, and he can take out a little good thing casually, which is what he dreams of.

Ye Tian had obtained information from the Ice Ghost Organization, and the biggest danger in the outermost part of this ruin was a special spirit puppet, the strength of this spirit puppet was comparable to that of the top peak realm god, no less than the Blood Shadow Puppet.

The key is that there are a lot of them, and after killing, they will be taken away by an inexplicable force, and then repaired again. []

Therefore, the spirit puppets here can't be killed.

Soon.

Ye Tian encountered six spirit puppets, and the strength of each spirit puppet was extremely powerful, perhaps the strength of a single spirit puppet was not as good as that of the Star Gathering Realm God, but if they joined forces, it was enough to threaten the Star Gathering Realm God.

"No wonder the peak realm gods of the Ice Ghost Organization dare not enter here, it is said that they once came in once and sacrificed a lot of peak realm gods!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Rumble!!!!

The six spirit puppets joined forces to attack, Ye Tian waved his hand, and the extradimensional power of the consummation realm directly fixed these six spirit puppets.

Ye Tian's strength was weakened, and so were the spirit puppets, and they couldn't show their true strength.

"Shattered!"

Ye Tian snorted coldly.

These six spirit golems instantly shattered into countless fragments, and then turned into six rays of light that were absorbed by an inexplicable force, and even he couldn't stop them.

Next, one spirit puppet after another attacked and killed Ye Tian, all of which were easily solved by him.

There were no half-step transcendent realm spirit puppets on the periphery of this ruin, so they couldn't threaten him at all.

However, there is nothing good on the periphery.

His target is still the core area inside 763, and no one knows exactly what is there.

"Gather the replica bodies one by one, and then explore!"

Ye Tian decided.

Airplanes!

Ye Tian's copied bodies condensed one by one, and then shuttled from all directions, going deep into this ruin.

After a while, Ye Tian came to the inner perimeter of the ruins.

Here, Ye Tian saw a kind of golden spirit puppet, and these spirit puppets even had extradimensional stripes on their bodies.

"It's a spirit puppet refined by extradimensional rules!"

Ye Tian was secretly surprised.

The materials used by such spirit golems are also not ordinary, far from being comparable to the previous spirit golems.

Rumble!!!

Ye Tian was killed with this spirit puppet, but he was knocked away.

Obviously, the strength of this spirit puppet is also the top in the half-step transcendent realm.

"Kill!"

Ye Tian exploded all the super-dimensional power and super-dimensional body to the extreme, and it was only comparable to this spirit puppet.

But soon, Ye Tian's other copy bodies rushed over and besieged this spirit puppet together.

Thundered!!!!

In the continuous killing, the body of this spirit puppet was cracked apart, and it gradually became impossible to maintain.

After a long time.

Click!

This spirit golem was completely shattered, but it was still absorbed by an inexplicable force like other spirit golems, and not even a single fragment remained.
